headline: Amazon updated 2023’s Fire HD 10 tablet with 4GB of RAM
summary: Amazon's 2023 Fire HD 10 tablet received a quiet update. The budget tablet now features 4GB of RAM. This upgrades the previous 3GB RAM configuration.

headline: While you’re watching the World Cup, the feds may be watching you
summary: The US co-hosts the World Cup and America250 events. Spectators and residents in host cities may be under surveillance. Federal authorities are monitoring events with cameras and and drones.

headline: This slim camera has a transparent LCD screen for a viewfinder
summary: Godox launched a new slim digital camera, the C100. It features a unique transparent LCD screen viewfinder. This joins a trend of popular simple point-and-shoot cameras.

headline: I finally got my Trump phone
summary: The Verge finally received its long-awaited Trump Mobile T1 Phone. This comes over a year after its initial announcement. The article details the first impressions of the 'Trump phone.'

headline: Supergirl Reportedly Faced Creative Differences Between DC Studios and Craig Gillespie
summary: Supergirl film reportedly faced creative differences. DC Studios and director Craig Gillespie had conflicting visions. Multiple film cuts were tested months before release.

headline: Danganronpa 2x2 Delayed to Early 2027
summary: Spike Chunsoft announced a delay for Danganronpa 2x2. The game is now pushed back to early 2027. Fans will wait longer for the anticipated title.

headline: Heat 2 Reportedly Casts Leonardo DiCaprio and Christian Bale With Filming Planned for November 2026
summary: Leonardo DiCaprio and Christian Bale are reportedly cast in Heat 2. They will play Chris Shiherlis and Vincent Hanna. Filming for the sequel is planned for November 2026.

headline: Today's Top Deals: $150 Nintendo eShop Gift Card, Bose QuietComfort Headphones, and DJI Osmo Pocket 3 Camera
summary: Discover top tech deals for the 4th of July weekend. Highlights include a $150 Nintendo eShop Gift Card. Also featured are Bose QuietComfort Headphones and DJI Osmo Pocket 3 Camera.

headline: Starmer tells of 'intensely personal' decision to quit and warns Burnham in first interview since resigning
summary: Outgoing PM Starmer details his 'intensely personal' resignation. He stated to the BBC that ending his political career was tough. Starmer also issued a warning to Burnham in his first post-resignation interview.

headline: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wed in NYC in ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler
summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married in New York City. Adam Sandler officiated the star-studded ceremony. Celebrities like Benson Boone, Hugh Grant, Gigi Hadid, and Ethan Hawke attended.

headline: England-Mexico kick-off unchanged after Fifa U-turn
summary: England's World Cup last-16 tie against Mexico will kick off as scheduled. Fifa reversed an earlier decision, maintaining the original time. The match will start at 01:00 BST on Monday.

headline: Trump's new take on 250 years of American expansionism
summary: Trump offers a new perspective on 250 years of American expansion. The US has seen significant growth in land and population. The article explores future implications of this historical trend.
